subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and faithful one, grieve not, nor be thou dismayed. The aid and loving-kindness of the Abhá Beauty encompasseth thee, and His grace and succour are with thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت غم مخور پریشان مباش عون و عنایت جمال ابهی شاملست و فیض و نصرتش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
